description: CompositionClean-look blue stretchable denim trousers made of 100% cotton, has two pockets on the front plus coin pocket with red stitch detail, two patch pockets at the back, belt loops at waist, contrast stitch detailing and a zipper and button closure on the frontFitSlimWash careGentle machine wash in lukewarm water inside outDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry at low temperatureWarm ironA great smart/casual denim option from puma which keeps the clean, Sports look made famous by the brand.  These jeans have eye-catching features like the seam and stitch detail on the back pockets and red stitch line on the coin pocket.  Wear them with a checked flannel shirt or lumber jacket to complement the masculine denim.  These jeans would look great with ankle high leather boots – search on myntra for boots and pick the ones you like best.Model statisticsThe product is of waist 32” and length 34" on a model of height 6'1" and waist 31"
